recommendations: bash_glob_expansion_error is now RECURRING across two consecutive cycles — worth explicit intervention: when building rg or find commands in Bash that would require ** glob expansion, use rg's own recursive flags (rg -r, -g patterns) rather than relying on shell glob expansion, which silently fails in macOS bash 3.2 without globstar.

shell_tool_preference_violations and compound_command_overreach remain STABLE with no improvement trajectory across 7 sessions — further advisory recommendations are unlikely to produce change; deprioritize in favor of hook-based enforcement if improvement is desired.
